title: Antigravity SDK: Building a digital simulated world
summary: Google Antigravity SDK enables creation of multi-agent social simulations with autonomous virtual avatars in simulated environments. It was demonstrated at Google I/O with attendee avatars interacting in a simulated space station.
writeup: The video covers the Google Antigravity SDK, a toolkit for building multi-agent social simulations in which virtual avatars interact autonomously inside simulated environments. It centers on a Google I/O demonstration that placed attendee avatars in a virtual space station and let them act on their own. The takeaways: the SDK targets world simulation built from multiple AI agents, and the space station demo shows the approach applied to a populated, interactive setting.
